hero.subtitle: Experience spa therapies infused with nature's finest ingredients, bringing your body and mind to a state of perfect relaxation.

about.title: A holistic wellness journey
about.description: Nature Spa was born with the mission of bringing nature into every treatment. We use 100% organic ingredients, combining traditional massage techniques and modern technology to deliver a complete relaxation experience.

careers.submittedDesc: Our HR team will contact you within 3 business days.

booking.successDesc: We'll contact you to confirm within 15 minutes.

services.title: Nature-inspired therapies
services.subtitle: Each service is custom-designed, blending traditional methods with cutting-edge technology.

items.title: Herbal massage
items.desc: Therapeutic massage with premium herbal essential oils for deep tension relief.

items.title: Facial care
items.desc: Restore and rejuvenate your skin with organic ingredients from nature.

items.title: Full-body therapy
items.desc: Body wrap and scrub treatments for naturally smooth and firm skin.

items.title: Aromatherapy
items.desc: Premium aromatherapy with essential oils imported from France and Japan.

items.title: Couples spa
items.desc: A relaxation experience for couples in a private, romantic setting.

items.title: Detox & Cleanse
items.desc: Body cleansing program to naturally boost immunity and vitality.
